title: docs: add new containers-config(5) man page
body: Add a general man page which should describe the new config file loading order with some examples.

comments.body: @Luap99 (I’m not sure I can get to this today.) Can you have a LLM proofread tiny typos, please?
That's probably nitpick, but standardizing on "drop-in" or "drop in" would be good. Currently, we use them randomly it seems. I would vote for "drop-in".
@Luap99 , thanks for the patch. The new man-page looks great. I tried to correct few typos and grammar issues and pointed out few places where the documentation does not match the code.

@mtrmac Mind pushing your suggestions as extra commit yourself?

I need to spend my time on https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/779 to get this finished as I keep running in more corner cases there.
